Package org.eventb.core.ast

Interface ITypeEnvironment

All Known Subinterfaces:
IInferredTypeEnvironment, ISealedTypeEnvironment, ITypeEnvironmentBuilder
All Known Implementing Classes:
InferredTypeEnvironment, SealedTypeEnvironment, TypeEnvironment, TypeEnvironmentBuilder
public interface ITypeEnvironment
Common protocol for accessing type environments.

A type environment is a map from names to their respective type. It is used by the formula type-checker as both an input and output.

More precisely, the type-checker takes as input a type environment which gives the type of some names and produces as output a new inferred type environment that records the types inferred from the formula.

Type environments enforce name consistency. This means that all names must be valid identifier names in the associated language (as defined by the formula factory used to create this type environment) and that any name that occurs in a registered type (i.e., any carrier set name) is automatically added to the type environment as a given set.

This interface is not intended to be implemented by clients. Use FormulaFactory.makeTypeEnvironment() to create new type environments.

There are two implementations of this interface. One is mutable and allows to gradually build a type environment (see ITypeEnvironmentBuilder). The other is immutable and stores a stable type environment (see ISealedTypeEnvironment). Methods makeSnapshot() and makeBuilder() allow to navigate between these two variants.

Since:
1.0, 3.0
See Also:
  • FormulaFactory.isValidIdentifierName(String)

    ITypeEnvironment.IIterator
    Protocol for iterating over a type environment.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    contains(String name)
    Returns whether this type environment contains the given name.
    boolean
    contains(FreeIdentifier ident)
    Returns whether this type environment contains the given free identifier, that is the identifier name associated with the identifier type.
    boolean
    containsAll(ITypeEnvironment typenv)
    Returns whether the given type environment is a subset of this type environment.
    FormulaFactory
    getFormulaFactory()
    Returns the formula factory associated with this type environment.
    FreeIdentifier[]
    getFreeIdentifiers()
    Returns the list of free identifiers in this type environment.
    ITypeEnvironment.IIterator
    getIterator()
    Returns an iterator for traversing this type environment.
    Set<String>
    getNames()
    Returns the set of all names mapped in this type environment.
    Type
    getType(String name)
    Gets the type of a name in this type environment.
    boolean
    isEmpty()
    Returns whether this type environment is empty.
    boolean
    isTranslatable(FormulaFactory factory)
    Tells whether this type environment can be translated to the given formula factory.
    ITypeEnvironmentBuilder
    makeBuilder()
    Get a mutable copy of this type environment in order to build a new one.
    IDatatypeTranslation
    makeDatatypeTranslation()
    Returns a fresh new datatype translation for this type environment.
    IExtensionTranslation
    makeExtensionTranslation()
    Returns a fresh extension translation based on a snapshot of this type environment.
    IExtensionTranslation

    Returns a fresh extension translation based on a snapshot of this type environment.
    ISealedTypeEnvironment
    makeSnapshot()
    Get an immutable snapshot of this type environment.
    ITypeEnvironmentBuilder
    specialize(ISpecialization specialization)
    Returns the type environment obtained by applying the given specialization to this type environment.
    ITypeEnvironment
    translate(FormulaFactory factory)
    Returns a copy of this type environment built with the given formula factory.

  • Method Details

    • contains

      boolean contains(String name)
      Returns whether this type environment contains the given name.
      Parameters:
      name - the name to lookup
      Returns:
      true iff the type environment contains the given name

    • contains

      boolean contains(FreeIdentifier ident)
      Returns whether this type environment contains the given free identifier, that is the identifier name associated with the identifier type.
      Parameters:
      ident - the free identifier to lookup
      Returns:
      true iff the type environment contains the given free identifier
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the given identifier is not type-checked
      Since:
      3.0

    • containsAll

      boolean containsAll(ITypeEnvironment typenv)
      Returns whether the given type environment is a subset of this type environment.

      In other words, this method returns true iff all mappings in typenv also occur in this typing environment.

      Parameters:
      typenv - the type environment to check for inclusion
      Returns:
      true iff the given type environment is a subset of this type environment

    • makeDatatypeTranslation

      IDatatypeTranslation makeDatatypeTranslation()
      Returns a fresh new datatype translation for this type environment. The resulting translation will be applicable to any formula which is type-checked within this type environment.
      Returns:
      a fresh datatype translation context
      Since:
      2.7
      See Also:
      • Formula.translateDatatype(IDatatypeTranslation)

    • makeExtensionTranslation

      IExtensionTranslation makeExtensionTranslation()
      Returns a fresh extension translation based on a snapshot of this type environment. The resulting translation will be applicable to any formula which is type-checked within this type environment at the time of the call to this method.
      Returns:
      a fresh extension translation
      Since:
      3.1
      See Also:
      • Formula.translateExtensions(IExtensionTranslation)

    • makeExtensionTranslation

      IExtensionTranslation makeExtensionTranslation(FormulaFactory targetFactory)
      Returns a fresh extension translation based on a snapshot of this type environment. The resulting translation will be applicable to any formula which is type-checked within this type environment at the time of the call to this method. The provided target factory must contain at least the extensions that are not translatable by implementations of IExtensionTranslation. If it contains more extensions, these will not be translated.
      Parameters:
      targetFactory - target factory to use
      Returns:
      a fresh extension translation
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the target factory misses some untranslatable extensions
      Since:
      3.7
      See Also:
      • Formula.translateExtensions(IExtensionTranslation)

    • getIterator

      ITypeEnvironment.IIterator getIterator()
      Returns an iterator for traversing this type environment.
      Returns:
      an iterator on this type environment.

    • getNames

      Set<String> getNames()
      Returns the set of all names mapped in this type environment.
      Returns:
      the set of all mapped names

    • getType

      Type getType(String name)
      Gets the type of a name in this type environment.
      Parameters:
      name - the name to lookup
      Returns:
      the type associated to the given name or null if it is not in this type environment.

    • getFreeIdentifiers

      FreeIdentifier[] getFreeIdentifiers()
      Returns the list of free identifiers in this type environment. This is equivalent to getting all the identifiers in this type environment with getNames() and then getting the type of each identifier with getType(String).
      Returns:
      the list of free identifiers
      Since:
      3.7

    • isEmpty

      boolean isEmpty()
      Returns whether this type environment is empty.
      Returns:
      true iff this environment doesn't contain any mapping.

    • getFormulaFactory

      FormulaFactory getFormulaFactory()
      Returns the formula factory associated with this type environment.
      Returns:
      the associated formula factory
      Since:
      2.0

    • specialize

      ITypeEnvironmentBuilder specialize(ISpecialization specialization)
      Returns the type environment obtained by applying the given specialization to this type environment. The effect of this application is to specialize all types of the type environment, to remove all free identifiers that are substituted by the given specialization and to introduce all free identifiers that occur in substituting expressions for the free identifiers that have been removed.

      The given specialization may change as a side-effect of calling this method. Please see the documentation of ISpecialization for details.

      The returned type environment is always a new object, even if the specialization has no effect on this type environment (e.g., no substitution of type or free identifier has been performed),

      Parameters:
      specialization - the specialization to apply
      Returns:
      the type environment obtained by applying the given specialization to this type environment
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the given specialization is not compatible with this type environment, that is the specialization contains a substitution for an identifier with the same name as an identifier in this type environment, but with a different type
      Since:
      3.0

    • isTranslatable

      boolean isTranslatable(FormulaFactory factory)
      Tells whether this type environment can be translated to the given formula factory. This method therefore implements the precondition of the translation method.

      This type environment is translatable to the given factory if

      • no name of this type environment becomes a reserved word;
      • all types of this type environment can be translated.

      Parameters:
      factory - the target formula factory
      Returns:
      true iff a call to translate(FormulaFactory) would succeed
      Since:
      3.0

    • translate

      ITypeEnvironment translate(FormulaFactory factory)
      Returns a copy of this type environment built with the given formula factory.

      If the factory of this type environment and the given factory are the same, then this type environment is returned, rather than an identical copy of it. Otherwise a new type environment object is built.

      Calling this method when isTranslatable(FormulaFactory) returns false will raise an IllegalArgumentException.

      Parameters:
      factory - the target formula factory
      Returns:
      an equivalent type environment built with the given factory
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this type environment is not translatable
      Since:
      3.0

    • makeSnapshot

      ISealedTypeEnvironment makeSnapshot()
      Get an immutable snapshot of this type environment.
      Returns:
      a snapshot of this type environment
      Since:
      3.0

    • makeBuilder

      ITypeEnvironmentBuilder makeBuilder()
      Get a mutable copy of this type environment in order to build a new one. The copy is guaranteed to be a different instance and will evolve independently of this type environment.
      Returns:
      a copy of this type environment as a builder
      Since:
      3.0
